series_metadata.series_description: The Business Enterprise Operating Program System file contains a copy of the operating system that is distributed to operators to as an optional method to produce monthly and semi-annual reports; inventories and daily cash reports as required by the Business Enterprise Program.

retention_rules.disposition: Electronic: The most current version of the software is retained on a permanent basis. Retain until the current system is updated, superseded, or becomes obsolete. Destroy outdated system., Electronic: Delete
